name: Barbara Bush's All-American Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces clams, canned with liquid,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Save the clam liquor.
2. Cook the bacon in a frying pan until crisp. Remove and drain; chop into 1-inch pieces.
3. Brown the onion in the bacon fat.
4. Add the clam liquor and potatoes to the pan. Cover and cook over low heat until the potatoes are tender (about 15 minutes).
5. Blend together the bacon pieces, minced clams, and remaining ingredients. Heat through without boiling.
6. Serve garnished with additional bacon if desired. Serves 4.
